title: Senior devs flee big tech’s invisible work
meta_description: Senior devs quit big tech over invisible work: flaky tests, missing observability, $12k rollbacks. 2026 data shows 38% turnover linked to technical debt, not pay. Learn the four gaps and how to fix them today.
prewritten_tweet:
Most senior engineers quit big tech not over pay, but over invisible work: flaky tests, missing observability, $12k rollbacks.

https://kubaik.github.io/senior-devs-flee-big-techs-invisible-work
